items.title: "Being good when you expect it is standard, and stressful.
items.body_excerpt:
"Being good when you expect it is standard, and stressful.

Being bad when you’re anticipating good is soul crushing.

Being bad when you could see it coming is an exercise in futility.

Only being good when you thought you’d be awful is fun."

Pieces like these are my favorite. Awesome read ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️
